headline: HORMEL® Pepperoni Launches Snack Bites for the Moments When Hunger Doesn't Wait
summary: Hunger doesn't care what time it is. That's the reality the HORMEL® Pepperoni brand is stepping into with the launch of HORMEL® Pepperoni Snack Bites, a new refrigerated protein snack designed for moments when people want something fast and satisfying.

headline: Spam maker exits entire market
summary: A major packaged food company is exiting an entire market after years of weak performance, saying the business had become a "drag" on overall results. It joins a growing number of food manufacturers shedding underperforming operations to focus on higher-growth opportunities. The move reflects a ...
